# LearnSlice

> AI-powered vocational training platform for German apprenticeships (Ausbildung)

## About

LearnSlice is a B2B SaaS platform that automates mentoring for apprentices (Azubis) in German companies. It combines IHK exam-aligned learning paths with company-specific knowledge into personalized AI coaching — making apprentices job-ready in 8 weeks instead of 6 months.

## Key Features

- IHK exam preparation aligned to regional requirements
- AI-powered 24/7 personal coaching and adaptive learning paths
- Company-specific onboarding content via document upload
- Automated assessments: quizzes, case studies, deep dives
- Executive analytics dashboards for training managers
- Gamification with points, badges, and leaderboards
- GDPR-compliant, hosted in Germany

## Results

- 65% faster time to productivity (4-6 months reduced to 8 weeks)
- €32K–€41K saved per apprentice
- 50% reduction in trainer time (€10K savings per apprentice)
- Dropout reduction from 30% to 15%

## Target Audience

- German SMEs with apprentices (Ausbildungsbetriebe)
- Vocational schools (Berufsschulen)
- IHK/HWK chambers and regional agencies
- Corporate training departments

## Vocational Professions Covered

- Kauffrau/Kaufmann für Büromanagement (Office Management)
- Kauffrau/Kaufmann für Spedition und Logistikdienstleistung
- Fachkraft für Lagerlogistik (Warehouse Logistics)
- Fachinformatiker Systemintegration
- Fachinformatiker Anwendungsentwicklung
- Fachinformatiker Digitale Vernetzung
- Fachinformatiker Daten- und Prozessanalyse
- KFZ-Mechatroniker (Automotive Mechatronics)

## Company

- Name: LearnSlice UG (haftungsbeschränkt)
- Location: Düsseldorf, Germany
- Contact: info@learnslice.com
